meaning: adj.崇拜的,可贵的,可敬的,值得尊敬的,尊贵的
examples: It is generally regarded as benevolent, powerful, worshipful and lucky.
The ancient Hindu term yoni has achieved some currency today, and has respectful, even worshipful connotations.
A man's ideal woman is the one he passes with a worshipful bow-when he's on his way to call on the other woman.
Gerhaher, who is forty-two, took master classes with Fischer-Dieskau and speaks of his predecessor in worshipful terms.
At the end of the 19th century, a dealer offered Harrison's personal pocket watch to the Worshipful Company of Clockmakers.
